name: Rexxar
description: A Bruiser that with his bear, Misha, expertly controls areas of the battleground.
title: Champion of the Horde
info: It was a strange twist of fate that led the wandering half-ogre Rexxar to the fledgling city of Orgrimmar. With his aid, Thrall and the Horde were able to secure their homeland and defend it from the invading forces of Lord Admiral Daelin Proudmoore.

Rexxar.name: Spirit Swoop
Rexxar.description: Deal 141 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in a line, slowing them by 30% for 2 seconds.

Rexxar.name: Misha, Charge!
Rexxar.description: Misha charges in a line, dealing 150 (+4% per level) damage and stunning enemies for 1.25 seconds.

Rexxar.name: Mend Pet
Rexxar.description: Heal Misha for 714 (+4% per level) Health over 5 seconds.

Rexxar.name: Unleash the Boars
Rexxar.description: Release a herd of boars that track down all enemy Heroes in a direction, dealing 110 (+4% per level) damage, revealing, and slowing enemies by 40% for 5 seconds.

Rexxar.name: Bestial Wrath
Rexxar.description: Increases Misha's Basic Attack damage by 200% for 12 seconds.

Rexxar.name: Misha, Focus!
Rexxar.description: Passive: Misha gains 15% move speed.  Command Misha to attack a specific enemy or move to a point and wait.  Targeting Rexxar commands Misha to retreat to his position, gaining 30% move speed until she reaches Rexxar.  Targeting Misha commands her to hold her current position.

1.name: Bird of Prey
1.description: Increases Spirit Swoop's damage by 150% to Minions.

1.name: Easy Prey
1.description: Increases Misha's basic attack damage to Minions and Mercenaries by 150%, and Misha gains 50 Armor against Minions and Mercenaries, reducing damage taken by 50%.

1.name: Flare
1.description: Fire a flare at an area, revealing it for 20 seconds.

4.name: Hungry Bear
4.description: Misha's Basic Attacks heal her for 4.5% of her maximum Health.

4.name: Hunter-Gatherer
4.description: Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe increases Rexxar and Misha's Health Regeneration by 1 per second, up to 25 per second.  Reward: After gathering 25 Globes, Rexxar and Misha gain 15 Armor.

4.name: Grizzled Fortitude
4.description: Every 6 seconds, Rexxar and Misha gain 75 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by 75%.  Stores up to 2 charges. Both Rexxar and Misha have their own charges.

4.name: Animal Husbandry
4.description: Rexxar and Misha gain 2 Maximum Health every second Rexxar remains alive. These bonuses are lost on Rexxar's death.

7.name: Crippling Talons
7.description: Increases Spirit Swoop's slow amount to 50% and its duration to 3.5 seconds.

7.name: Taking Flight
7.description: Increases Spirit Swoop's range by 20%. If Spirit Swoop hits an enemy Hero, the Mana cost is refunded and its cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds.

7.name: Aspect of the Beast
7.description: Misha's Basic Attacks lower the cooldown of Misha, Charge! by 1 second.

10.name: Bestial Wrath
10.description: Increases Misha's Basic Attack damage by 200% for 12 seconds.

10.name: Unleash the Boars
10.description: Release a herd of boars that track down all enemy Heroes in a direction, dealing 110 (+4% per level) damage, revealing, and slowing enemies by 40% for 5 seconds.

13.name: Aspect of the Hawk
13.description: When Spirit Swoop hits an enemy Hero, Rexxar gains 125% Attack Speed for 4 seconds. Misha's Basic Attacks increase the duration of this buff by 0.75 seconds.

13.name: Dire Beast
13.description: Rexxar and Misha's Basic Attacks increase the damage of the next Misha, Charge! by 15%, stacking up to a 150% bonus.

13.name: Wildfire Bear
13.description: Misha deals 28 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies.

16.name: Thrill of the Hunt
16.description: Rexxar's Basic Attacks increase both his and Misha's Movement Speed by 25% for 2 seconds.

16.name: Primal Intimidation
16.description: Activate to Slow the Attack Speed by 50% and Movement Speed by 20% of Heroes and Summons near Rexxar and Misha for 2.5 seconds.  Passive: Heroes and Summons that attack Rexxar or Misha have their Attack Speed slowed by 20% for 2.5 seconds.

16.name: Feign Death
16.description: Rexxar fakes his death, becoming Invulnerable and untargetable for 5 seconds. During this time you control Misha.

20.name: Spirit Bond
20.description: Increases the duration of Bestial Wrath by 50% and Misha's Basic Attacks heal Rexxar for 50% of her damage dealt during Bestial Wrath.

20.name: Kill Command
20.description: Unleash the Boars deals 50% more damage and Roots for 1.5 seconds.

20.name: Frenzy of Kalimdor
20.description: Rexxar's Basic Attacks deal 10% more damage, and Misha's Basic Attacks slow the target by 20% for 1.25 seconds.

20.name: Hardened Skin
20.description: Rexxar and Misha gain 75 Armor for 4 seconds, reducing damage taken by 75%.

abilities.name: Misha, Charge!
abilities.description: Misha charges in a line, dealing <c val="bfd4fd">150~~0.04~~</c> damage and stunning enemies for <c val="bfd4fd">1.25</c> seconds.

tooltipMarkup.RexxarAnimalHusbandry: Rexxar and Misha gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RexxarAnimalHusbandryModifyTokenCounter,Value*Accumulator,RexxarAnimalHusbandryHealthAccumulator,Scale"/></c> Maximum Health every second Rexxar remains alive. These bonuses are lost on Rexxar's death.
tooltipMarkup.RexxarAspectOfTheHawkTalent: When Spirit Swoop hits an enemy Hero, Rexxar gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RexxarSpiritSwoopAspectOfTheHawk,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c> Attack Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RexxarSpiritSwoopAspectOfTheHawk,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds. Misha's Basic Attacks increase the duration of this buff by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RexxarSpiritSwoopAspectoftheHawkTalentModifyBehaviorDuration,Value"precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RexxarAspectoftheBeastTalent: Misha's Basic Attacks lower the cooldown of Misha, Charge! by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,RexxarMishaChargeAspectoftheBeastTalentModifyChargeCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse" precision="2"/></c> second.
tooltipMarkup.RexxarBestialWrath: Increases Misha's Basic Attack damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,RexxarBestialWrathMishaBehavior,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Basic]"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RexxarBestialWrathMishaBehavior,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RexxarCripplingTalonsTalent: Increases Spirit Swoop's slow amount to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*(Behavior,RexxarSpiritSwoopSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor+Talent,RexxarSpiritSwoopCripplingTalons,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value)"player="0"/>%</c> and its duration to<c val="#TooltipNumbers"> <d ref="Behavior,RexxarSpiritSwoopSlow,Duration+Talent,RexxarSpiritSwoopCripplingTalons,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"player="0"Precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RexxarDireBeast: Rexxar and Misha's Basic Attacks increase the damage of the next Misha, Charge! by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,RexxarDireBeastAccumulator,Scale"/>%</c>, stacking up to a <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,RexxarDireBeastAccumulator,MaxAccumulation"/>%</c> bonus.
tooltipMarkup.RexxarFeignDeath: Rexxar fakes his death, becoming Invulnerable and untargetable for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RexxarFeignDeathInvulnerable,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds. During this time you control Misha.
tooltipMarkup.RexxarFlare: Fire a flare at an area, revealing it for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RexxarFlareCreatePersistentRevealer,PeriodCount/16"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RexxarFrenzyofKalimdorTalent: Rexxar's Basic Attacks deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,RexxarFrenzyofKalimdor,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Basic]"/>%</c> more damage, and Misha's Basic Attacks slow the target by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,RexxarFrenzyofKalimdorSlowDebuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RexxarFrenzyofKalimdorSlowDebuff,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RexxarHardenedSkin: Rexxar and Misha gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RexxarHardenedSkinBuff,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RexxarHardenedSkinBuff,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds, reducing damage taken by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RexxarHardenedSkinBuff,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.RexxarHungryBearTalent: Misha's Basic Attacks heal her for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RexxarHungryBearMishaCreateHealer,RechargeVitalFraction*100" precision="1"/>%</c> of her maximum Health.
tooltipMarkup.RexxarHunterGathererTalent: Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe increases Rexxar and Misha's Health Regeneration by per second, up to per second. Reward: After gathering Globes, Rexxar and Misha gain Armor.
tooltipMarkup.RexxarMendPet: Heal Misha for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RexxarMendPetCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate * [d ref='Behavior,RexxarMendPet,Duration+1' player='0'/]"/></c> Health over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RexxarMendPet,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RexxarMishaChargeRedirect: Misha charges in a line, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RexxarMishaChargeDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and stunning enemies for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RexxarMishaChargeStun,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RexxarMishaFocus: <c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Misha gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,RexxarMishaPassiveMoveSpeed,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> move speed. <n/><n/>Command Misha to attack a specific enemy or move to a point and wait.<n/><n/>Targeting Rexxar commands Misha to retreat to his position, gaining <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,RexxarMishaFollowFollow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> move speed until she reaches Rexxar.<n/><n/>Targeting Misha commands her to hold her current position.
tooltipMarkup.RexxarSpiritBondEasyPreyTalent: Increases Misha's basic attack damage to Minions and Mercenaries by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RexxarMishaWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[EasyPrey].Modifier*100"/>%</c>, and Misha gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RexxarMishaEasyPreyDamageReduction,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Minion].ArmorMitigationTable[Basic]"/></c> Armor against Minions and Mercenaries, reducing damage taken by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RexxarMishaEasyPreyDamageReduction,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Minion].ArmorMitigationTable[Basic]"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.RexxarSpiritBondGrizzledFortitudeTalent: Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TalentBucketBlockCharged,DamageResponse.Cost.Charge.TimeUse+Talent,RexxarSpiritBondGrizzledFortitude,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> seconds, Rexxar and Misha gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TalentBucketBlockChargedArmorBehaviorTarget,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Basic]"/></c> Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TalentBucketBlockChargedArmorBehaviorTarget,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Basic]"/>%</c>.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TalentBucketBlockCharged,DamageResponse.Cost.Charge.CountMax"/></c> charges. Both Rexxar and Misha have their own charges.
tooltipMarkup.RexxarSpiritBondPrimalIntimidationTalent: Activate to Slow the Attack Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,TalentImposingPresenceActivatedDebuff,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor"/>%</c> and Movement Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,TalentImposingPresenceActivatedDebuffSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> of Heroes and Summons near Rexxar and Misha for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TalentImposingPresenceActivatedDebuffSlow,Duration"precision="2"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Heroes and Summons that attack Rexxar or Misha have their Attack Speed slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,TalentImposingPresenceDamageResponseDebuff,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TalentImposingPresenceDamageResponseDebuff,Duration"precision="2"/> </c>seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RexxarSpiritBondTalent: Increases the duration of Bestial Wrath by<c val="#TooltipNumbers"> 50%</c> and Misha's Basic Attacks heal Rexxar for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of her damage dealt during Bestial Wrath.
tooltipMarkup.RexxarSpiritBondWildfireBearTalent: Misha deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RexxarSpiritBondWildfireBearDamage,Amount"/></c> damage per second to nearby enemies.
tooltipMarkup.RexxarSpiritSwoop: Deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RexxarSpiritSwoopDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies in a line, slowing them by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RexxarSpiritSwoopSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*(-100)" player="0"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RexxarSpiritSwoopSlow,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RexxarSpiritSwoopBirdOfPreyTalent: Increases Spirit Swoop's damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RexxarSpiritSwoopDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[0].Modifier*100"/>%</c> to Minions.
tooltipMarkup.RexxarTakingFlightTalent: Increases Spirit Swoop's range by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c>. If Spirit Swoop hits an enemy Hero, the Mana cost is refunded and its cooldown is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,RexxarSpiritSwoopTakingFlightRefundCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RexxarThrilloftheHuntTalent: Rexxar's Basic Attacks increase both his and Misha's Movement Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,RexxarThrilloftheHuntBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RexxarThrilloftheHuntBuff,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RexxarUnleashTheBoars: Release a herd of boars that track down all enemy Heroes in a direction, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RexxarUnleashTheBoarsDamage,Amount"/></c> damage, revealing, and slowing enemies by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,RexxarUnleashTheBoarsSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RexxarUnleashTheBoarsSlow,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RexxarUnleashTheBoarsKillCommandTalent: Unleash the Boars deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RexxarUnleashTheBoarsDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[KillCommand].Modifier*100"/>%</c> more damage and Roots for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RexxarUnleashTheBoarsKillCommandRoot,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
